//: Prompt Lab — LIVE-MODE config (Wave CY.18.213). COPY this file to `tool/prompt_lab/local.json` (gitignored) and fill it in from one of your configured providers, then run the live harness (see `prompt_lab_live.dart` for the command). `local.json` holds your API key and must NEVER be committed — it is already in .gitignore.
//baseUrl: The provider base URL, e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1 or your Venice/OpenRouter/local URL. Pyre appends `/chat/completions`.
//model: The exact model id the provider expects, e.g. gpt-4o-mini, qwen-3.6-plus, etc.
//apiKey: Your provider bearer token. Leave the placeholder here in the EXAMPLE file; only ever put a real key in local.json. Local servers (LM Studio/Ollama) usually ignore this — leave it blank for those.
//extraParams: Optional. Extra fields spread into the request body (e.g. {"reasoning": {"effort": "none"}} to disable reasoning on Qwen 3.x).
//kind: Optional. One of "external" (default), "localhost", or "proxy". Sets kind-aware timeouts; use "localhost" for LM Studio/Ollama.
